items.name_en: New LE 57 Shoulder Bag. This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
items.name_cn:
New LE 57 Shoulder Bag. This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
Model: 698567
Size: 24x18x5.5cm

items.name_en: New Lou Lou Chain Envelope Bag
items.name_cn:
New Lou Lou Chain Envelope Bag
Soft rose pink like a spilled palette 🎨 So cute!
Visible leather texture, soft and supple~
Includes detachable card holder and full-logo mirror 🪞
Spacious enough to hold all your daily essentials
Adjustable chain for versatile styling [Flying Kiss]
Size: 24✖️14✖️6cm

items.name_en: New small size with box YSL|||Saint Laurent suede mail bag, very unique, low-key and cool, really brings out the charm of a stylish, individual, and chic woman. It is the most popular Niki mail bag from YSL right now. Women who carry this bag are quite extraordinary, either celebrities, supermodels, or fashion trendsetters. In the past two years, the Niki mail bag has really gained a lot of fans with its distinctive style!

items.name_en: New Spring 25 LouLou Suede
items.name_cn:
New Spring 25 LouLou Suede
Soft to the touch, comes with a detachable card holder and full-label mirror. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear to meet various outfit needs!
Suede material makes the bag look especially exquisite. Size: 25x12x6cm. Style: 1Y821749

items.name_en: New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
items.name_cn:
New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
Fine-grain leather tote, fully lined in matching suede, adorned with exquisite Y letter logo inspired by the brand's historical collection. The shopping bag is lightweight and spacious, featuring an internal zippered pocket and a hook closure! A touch of Parisian sophistication with a relaxed vibe, don't miss this if you love large capacity bags!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 37X32X7CM

specs.rawTitle:
New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
Fine-grain leather tote, fully lined in matching suede, adorned with exquisite Y letter logo inspired by the brand's historical collection. The shopping bag is lightweight and spacious, featuring an internal zippered pocket and a hook closure! A touch of Parisian sophistication with a relaxed vibe, don't miss this if you love large capacity bags!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 37X32X7CM

items.name_en: New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
items.name_cn:
New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
The most popular tote of the year is definitely this one.
The capacity is really friendly, and carrying a big bag in winter really gives off a great vibe!
Sisters, I want the Black and Caramel, both colors are too beautiful. The YSL tote has a striking large logo, very individual and really beautiful.
Size 54x36. Model 8818
